projectDescription: A BepInEx mod for Gorilla Tag that bundles multiple movement and utility UIs — pull mod, PSA, predictions, velocity multiplier, wall walk, turn mod, and pit geometry tweaks — into a single in-game menu system.
keyFeatures: Single unified in-game menu (open/close with E key)
Pull Mod — velocity-based pull with configurable hand mode and speed presets
PSA Mod — joystick-driven player surface acceleration with ground detection
APreds — hand prediction system with smoothness and arm-length controls
VelMax Mod — surface velocity multiplier with configurable trigger input
AWallWalk V2 — forward force on walls via configurable dual-button hold
Astras TurnMod — smooth and snap turning with per-hand input selection
PitGeo Mod — slip wall and pit ground surface multiplier tweaks for the Forest pit
Room Utilities — join by code, join random, and leave via Photon
On-screen notifications for room join/leave events
publicApiSurface: Plugin (BepInEx entry point) — GUID: Astras.Mods.Experimental, Version: 0.0.4
Main.OnGUI / Update / FixedUpdate — orchestrates all sub-mod render/update loops
PSAModUI.MakePSAModUI() / RunPSAMod() / PSAMod(float speed, float maxGroundDist)
InputSelectors — PPressed, VPressed, UseWalkPressed, ATLPressed, ATRPressed, PitPressed, Axis
InputLib — RightGrab, LeftGrab, RightTrigger, LeftTrigger, A/B/X/Y buttons, joystick axes
MenuHelper.Dropdown(string id, string[] options, int selectedIndex, GUILayoutOption[])
GlobalTex.MakeTex(int w, int h, Color c)
GlobalVars — all shared state fields and enums (HandPullMode, TimeSettingss, SlipWallPitOptions, PitGroundOptions)
